summary: Template Draft/Sharing system fully tested (iteration_28). Backend: 24/24 tests PASS (100%). All draft CRUD endpoints working: save draft, list drafts, get draft with revisions, update draft (auto-version), delete draft. Sharing endpoints working: create share link (view-only/editable), access shared draft, update shared draft (when allowed), revoke share. Revision history working: get revisions, restore to version. Frontend: All UI flows verified - My Drafts page with Resume/Delete, Template Wizard with Save Draft/Update Draft/Share/History buttons, Share modal with copy link and View Only/Allow Editing options, Revisions modal with restore buttons, Resume draft loads pre-filled values.

dashboard_fetch.issue: GET /api/documents/seals returns error on dashboard load
dashboard_fetch.note: Pre-existing issue from previous iterations - not related to draft feature

critical_code_review_comments: Good: Version auto-increment on update works correctly
Good: Revisions array tracks all changes with saved_by and saved_at
Good: Share permissions enforced (view-only vs allow_edit)
Good: Access control working (403 for non-owner access)
Good: Restore creates new version instead of overwriting
Good: List endpoint excludes revisions for performance
Good: All data-testid attributes present for testing
Good: Resume draft correctly pre-fills field values
Good: Save button text changes to 'Update Draft' for existing drafts

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all UI elements and flows working

seed_data_creation: Created test drafts during testing, cleaned up TEST_ prefixed data. Existing drafts for demo@test.com remain in database.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Draft/Sharing system fully functional. Collection: template_drafts. Key fields: id, user_id, template_id, field_values, version (auto-incremented), revisions[] (array of all versions), share_token (nullable), share_allow_edit. Routes: /api/drafts/ (CRUD), /api/drafts/{id}/share (create/revoke), /api/drafts/shared/{token} (access via token), /api/drafts/{id}/revisions (history), /api/drafts/{id}/revisions/{version}/restore. Frontend pages: /my-drafts, /templates/{id}/fill?draft={draftId}, /drafts/shared/{token}.

backend_api.GET /api/drafts/{draft_id}: Get draft with full revisions - PASS

frontend_ui.resume_draft_flow: Pre-fills values correctly when loading ?draft=param - PASS

mocked_apis.note: No APIs are mocked - all endpoints are fully functional
